markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect on a potential programmatic SEO partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**LandingAI's Pivot:** The company is now focused on its successful agentic document extraction API, targeting both developers and business decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Core Service:** The offering is a focused, end-to-end content engine for SEO/AEO, not a full-service agency. The initial 12-month contract is a "leap of faith" required to build a long-term organic engine.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [**Strategic Mismatch:** GrowthX's initial focus on high-quality answers to existing search demand conflicts with LandingAI's need for novel, thought-leadership content to stand out in a crowded, technical market.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Tyler will send proof points (case studies, technical examples). A follow-up demo is planned to explore if GrowthX's capabilities can meet LandingAI's specific needs.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)

## Topics

### LandingAI's Context & Needs

  - [**Company Pivot:** Shifted from computer vision to agentic document extraction, an API product with strong market reception.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**Target Audience:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Developers:** Enterprise users processing high document volumes.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [**Business Decision-Makers:** Seeking process optimization and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [**Content Goal:** Build a growth plan for the new document extraction product, aligning with a website refresh in the next two months.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

### GrowthX's Service & Model

  - [**Core Offering:** An end-to-end content engine for SEO/AEO, focused on getting clients "in the answer" of AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Service Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Included:** Editorial & programmatic content (strategy, creation, publishing, monitoring).](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [**Excluded (Initially):** Link building, social media, paid media, sales lead gen.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [**Add-ons:** Custom workstreams (e.g., newsletters) are possible after 3–6 months for an additional $9k–$15k/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Pricing & Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-week Strategy Sprint):** $30k. Delivers a technical SEO audit, content roadmap, and 5–10 articles to calibrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (12-month Growth Execution):** $15k/mo. Delivers 5 net new or refreshed articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**Team & Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**Team:** Engagement Manager (POC), Managing Editor, and Managing Directors (for strategic support).](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
      - [**Reporting:** A Looker dashboard tracks sessions/conversions; Scrunch tracks AI search metrics (answers, citations, sentiment).](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### Strategic Mismatch: Content Quality vs. Novelty

  - [**LandingAI's Concern:** The need for novel, thought-leadership content to stand out in a competitive space (vs. Google, Amazon, Microsoft).](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Position:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
      - [Initial focus is on creating the *best answer* to existing search demand, not necessarily novel content.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [Novelty is a later-stage capability, requiring a deep knowledge base built over time.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
      - [Technical content (e.g., code snippets) is possible but requires a clear SEO opportunity first.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
      - [Send proof points: case studies and technical content examples (e.g., Augment Code).](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up demo of GrowthX's AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [**Ankit & Grace:**](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
      - [Review proof points and team profiles on LinkedIn to assess technical expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/kJGFt_WEeynP2T8uCf1Jw8x45F3UUevU?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
